content: Create a room based on a template. All settings, users, folders and files will be taken from the selected room template.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a message that explains the source room template being applied when creating a new room. It is typically displayed in a UI element such as a button or dialog that initiates the creation process, and its purpose is to inform users about the nature of the room's settings and configuration.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Arabic translation omits the word 'users' (المستخدمين), which is a key component of the English source text describing what will be transferred.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: أنشئوا غرفة استنادًا إلى قالب. سيتم نقل جميع الإعدادات والمستخدمين والمجلدات والملفات من قالب الغرفة المختار.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (istifadəçilər) from the English source is missing in the Azerbaijani translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Şablon əsasında otaq yaradın. Bütün parametrlər, istifadəçilər, qovluqlar və fayllar seçilmiş otaq şablonundan idxal ediləcək.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (потребители) is missing from the Bulgarian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Създайте стая по шаблон. Всички настройки, потребители, папки и файлове ще бъдат взети от избрания шаблон за стая.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (uživatelé) is missing from the Czech translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vytvoření místnosti podle šablony. Všechna nastavení, uživatelé, složky a soubory budou převzaty z vybrané šablony místnosti.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (Benutzer) from the English source is missing in the German translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Erstellen Sie einen Raum basierend auf einer Vorlage. Alle Einstellungen, Benutzer, Ordner und Dateien werden aus der ausgewählten Raumvorlage übernommen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (οι χρήστες) is missing from the Greek translation, which changes the scope of what is being copied from the template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Δημιουργήστε μια αίθουσα με βάση ένα πρότυπο. Όλες οι ρυθμίσεις, οι χρήστες, οι φάκελοι και τα αρχεία θα ληφθούν από το επιλεγμένο πρότυπο δωματίου.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (usuarios) is missing from the Spanish translation, which changes the scope of what is being copied from the template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Cree una sala basada en una plantilla. Todos los ajustes, usuarios, carpetas y archivos se tomarán de la plantilla de sala seleccionada.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (käyttäjät) is missing from the Finnish translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Luo huone mallin perusteella. Kaikki asetukset, käyttäjät, kansiot ja tiedostot otetaan valitusta huoneen mallista.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (utilisateurs) is missing from the French translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Créez une salle à partir d'un modèle. Tous les paramètres, utilisateurs, dossiers et fichiers seront repris du modèle de salle sélectionné.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation omits the word 'users' (օգտատերեր) which is present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ստեղծեք սենյակ կաղապարի հիման վրա: Բոլոր կարգավորումները, օգտատերերը, թղթապանակներն ու ֆայլերը կվերցվեն ընտրված սենյակի կաղապարից։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (utenti) is missing from the Italian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Crea una stanza basata su un modello. Tutte le impostazioni, gli utenti, le cartelle e i file verranno presi dal modello di stanza selezionato.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (ユーザー) from the English source is missing in the Japanese translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: テンプレートに基づいてルームを作成します。すべての設定、ユーザー、フォルダー、およびファイルは、選択されたルームのテンプレートから取得されます。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (사용자) from the English source is missing in the Korean translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 템플릿을 기반으로 룸을 생성하세요. 모든 설정, 사용자, 폴더 및 파일은 선택된 룸 템플릿에서 가져오기됩니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (ຜູ້ໃຊ້) is missing from the Lao translation, which changes the scope of what is being copied from the template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ສ້າງຫ້ອງໂດຍອີງຕາມແມ່ແບບ. ການຕັ້ງຄ່າ, ຜູ້ໃຊ້, ໂຟນເດີ ແລະ ໄຟລ໌ທັງໝົດຈະຖືກເອົາຈາກແມ່ແບບຫ້ອງທີ່ເລືອກ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (lietotāji) is missing from the Latvian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izveidojiet telpu, pamatojoties uz veidni. Visi iestatījumi, lietotāji, mapes un faili tiks pārņemti no izvēlētās telpas veidnes.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' is missing from the Dutch translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Maak een kamer op basis van een sjabloon. Alle instellingen, gebruikers, mappen en bestanden worden overgenomen van de geselecteerde kamer sjabloon.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' is missing from the Polish translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Utwórz pokój na podstawie szablonu. Wszystkie ustawienia, użytkownicy, katalogi i pliki zostaną wzięte z wybranego szablonu pokoju.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' from the English source is missing in the Portuguese translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Crie uma sala com base num template. Todas as definições, utilizadores, pastas e ficheiros serão retirados do modelo de sala selecionado.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (usuários) is missing from the Portuguese translation, which changes the scope of what is being copied from the template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Crie uma sala com base em um modelo. Todas as configurações, usuários, pastas e arquivos serão retirados do modelo de sala selecionado.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (utilizatorii) from the English source is missing in the Romanian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Creați o sală pe baza unui șablon. Toate setările, utilizatorii, folderele și fișierele vor fi preluate din șablonul de sală selectat.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' from the English source is missing in the Russian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Создайте комнату на основе шаблона. Все настройки, пользователи, папки и файлы будут взяты из выбранного шаблона комнаты.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation omitted the word 'users' (පරිශීලකයින්) which is present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: අච්චුවක් මත පදනම්ව කාමරයක් සාදන්න. සියලුම සැකසුම්, පරිශීලකයින්, ෆෝල්ඩර සහ ගොනු තෝරාගත් කාමර අච්චුවෙන් ගනු ලැබේ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (používatelia) is missing from the Slovak translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vytvorenie miestnosti na základe šablóny. Všetky nastavenia, používatelia, priečinky a súbory budú prevzaté z vybranej šablóny miestnosti.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (uporabniki) is missing from the Slovenian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ustvarite sobo na podlagi predloge. Vse nastavitve, uporabniki, mape in datoteke bodo prevzete iz izbrane predloge sobe.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (корисници) is missing from the Serbian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Креирајте собу на основу шаблона. Сви подешавања, корисници, фолдери и фајлови биће преузети из одабраног шаблона собе.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with "e"
The word 'users' (korisnici) is missing from the Serbian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kreirajte sobu na osnovu šablona. Sva podešavanja, korisnici, folderi i fajlovi biće preuzeti iz odabranog šablona sobe

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (kullanıcılar) is missing from the Turkish translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Bir şablona göre oda oluşturun. Tüm ayarlar, kullanıcılar, klasörler ve dosyalar seçilen oda şablonundan alınacaktır.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' (користувачі) is missing from the Ukrainian translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Створіть кімнату на основі шаблону. Усі параметри, користувачі, папки та файли будуть взяті з обраного шаблону кімнати.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'users' from the English source ('All settings, users, folders and files...') is missing in the Vietnamese translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Tạo phòng dựa trên biểu mẫu. Tất cả các cài đặt, người dùng, thư mục và tập tin sẽ được lấy từ mẫu phòng đã chọn.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits 'users' (用户), which is a key component of the settings being transferred from the template.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 使用模板创建房间。所有设置、用户、文件夹和文件都将从所选的房间模板中获取。

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'settings' was translated as 'vendimet' (decisions), which is incorrect in a technical context. It should be 'cilësimet'. Additionally, 'users' is missing from the translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Krijo një dhomë bazuar në një model. Të gjitha cilësimet, përdoruesit, folderët dhe fajljet do të merren nga modeli i dhomës i zgjedhur.
